# fleetdm_label (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a specific FleetDM label.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get a specific label by ID
data "fleetdm_label" "macos" {
  id = 1
}

# Use label data
output "label_name" {
  value = data.fleetdm_label.macos.name
}

output "label_query" {
  value = data.fleetdm_label.macos.query
}

output "hosts_in_label" {
  value = data.fleetdm_label.macos.host_count
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the label.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) A description of the label.
- `host_count` (Number) The number of hosts that belong to this label.
- `label_type` (String) The type of the label (regular or builtin).
- `name` (String) The name of the label.
- `platform` (String) The platform the label is restricted to (darwin, windows, linux, chrome).
- `query` (String) The SQL query that defines which hosts belong to this label.
